statement: In every magma, Equation 1574 (`x = (y * z) * (y * (y * y))`) implies Equation 136 (`x = y * ((z * x) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0231
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y z) (op y (op y y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z x) z))
